title: More Nonsense Limerick 55
content:
There was an old person of Grange,
    Whose manners were scroobious and strange;
    He sailed to St. Blubb 
    In a waterproof tub,
    That aquatic old person of Grange.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 55"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
